channel.title: R on Tim Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in R on Tim Thoughts

item.title: Back to Florida
item.description: Practicing my Leaflet and data cleaning skills! This is a very basic ethnicity breakdown of Census-tract level data of Florida using the 2014-2018 ACS datasets, focusing on CVAP (citizen voting age population) data. I’ve layered on a dot-density map of renters and internet accessibility. Will be adding some 2016/2018 electoral results soon.
